messages.title: Time to read! 📚
messages.body: Your town is waiting! Open a book and earn resources for your town.

messages.title: Your villagers miss you!
messages.body: A few pages a day keeps the boredom away. Come read and grow your town!

messages.title: Reading time! ✨
messages.body: Every page you read earns coins, wood and metal. Your town needs you!

messages.title: Bookworm alert! 🐛
messages.body: Did you know reading 20 minutes a day adds up to 1.8 million words a year? Let's go!

messages.title: Your town is growing!
messages.body: Keep reading to unlock new buildings and make your villagers happy!

messages.title: A page a day! 📖
messages.body: Even just one page counts. Log your reading session and earn rewards!

messages.title: Reading streak incoming!
messages.body: Don't break your habit! Pick up where you left off and read a little today.

messages.title: Storytime! 🌟
messages.body: Great stories are waiting for you. Read today and watch your town flourish!

messages.title: Happy villagers need books!
messages.body: Your villagers love it when you read. Log some pages and boost their happiness!

messages.title: Reading reminder 🌸
messages.body: Take a cozy break with your book. A few pages now can make your whole day better!

messages.title: Mission possible! 🎯
messages.body: You're so close to your reading goals! Log some pages to complete your missions.

messages.title: Knowledge is power! 💪
messages.body: Books make you smarter and your town stronger. What are you waiting for?
